title: What Did James Webb Find on Titan?

scenes.text: A groundbreaking molecule might be lurking beneath Titan's icy surface.
James Webb Telescope has captured spectra suggesting complex organic molecules on Titan.
Titan has lakes of liquid methane, making it a unique body for life search.
Could this moon hold the key to extraterrestrial life?
scenes.label: KEY TO LIFE?
scenes.sub: Searching for life in the cosmos

scenes.text: Follow for the science they never taught you.

description: James Webb Telescope may have found complex organic molecules on Titan. Could this moon be harboring extraterrestrial life? Follow for daily science!
